concepts.title: Morphisms of schemes
concepts.blurb: Scheme maps are local ring maps glued globally and tested on affines.

concepts.title: Fiber products and base change
concepts.blurb: Fiber products represent pullback problems and define base-change geometry.

concepts.title: Geometric fibers and smoothness intuition
concepts.blurb: Fibers over points reveal dimension, singularities, and arithmetic variation in families.
